author: y4rr
content: Pass 3 APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS. Roll grad_fn-registered with RollBackward (inverse rotation). New pub fn index_select_dim<T, I>(input, dim, indices) with IndexSelectDimBackward (scatter-add, duplicate-index accumulation). Swin's relative_position_bias_table gather (swin.rs:257-270) migrated; last production hot-path CPU-pull in Swin eliminated. 14 new tests in core grad_fns + 1 Swin training-mode end-to-end test. Sabotage probe (negation removal in RollBackward) caught with grad[0]=4 expected 3. core: 1291 PASS (was 1278, +13). vision: 758 PASS (was 757, +1). swin_t_value_parity preserved. Follow-ups: #1097 (roll CUDA forward kernel), #1098 (index_select_dim CUDA forward kernel).
